The plant is known for its health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and protect against oxidative stress. The bioactive constituents of Holostemma spp include iridoid glycosides, alkaloids, and flavonoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. In traditional medicine, Holostemma spp is commonly used to make herbal preparations, including teas, decoctions, and infusions, which are used to treat a range of ailments, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues.
